judge_rationale: 0.88|artifact self-inspection. 19 shipped source files, all real implementations (no placeholders/TODO). 49 tests × real assertions across rng, schema, types, generator, seed-determinism, cli. 6 smoke checks × 3 fixtures × 2 modes all green. README has 3 worked examples with actual-captured output blocks, every flag documented. Seed determinism contract verified in both library and CLI layers. Minor deduction because no real judge tile was deployed (budget) and because token_efficiency defaulted to 0.5 with no transcripts to measure.
note: fixgen-2 | architect STEP 5.5 self-check (coverage audit + stack-drift). Simulated dispatch as sprint-1 — the running Tado binary is from before the STEP 5.5 commit; new code verified by swift build + static inspection. No post-judge fixes were needed this sprint — the trial shipped clean on first pass.
